text:
黒ノ領域の奥のほうで
デカいヤツが、確認されたみたいだね。

小物ばかりで、くすぶってたんだ。
腕が鳴るね。

ま、あんたが気分が乗らないなら
アタシが倒してくるだけさ。

依頼を受ける、受けないは
個人の自由だよ。
無理強いはしない

I heard they verified an enormous Falspawn
deep within the Nightfall Province.

It'll be a nice change of pace from the endless
swath of small fry. I'm itching to put it down.

Well, if you aren't feeling up to it, then I'll
do it. Simple as that.

You're free to choose whether to accept the
request or not. I won't force you.
